title: Clearviews
description: removes the annoying blindness/nausea/darkness effects and removes overlays like water fog, pumpkin, spyglass, portal, fire, vignette and locator bar. Compatible with sodium and highly configurable
body:
# Clearviews
**Clearviews** is a simple but powerful mod that lets you remove some of Minecraft's annoying screen overlays. If you're tired of effects like nausea, darkness, and pumpkin blur annoying you, this mod has got you covered. You can decide exactly which effects you want to keep and which you want to remove, so you get a cleaner, distraction-free experience without unwanted overlays.


~~KEYBINDS ARE STANDARDLY UNASSIGNED, ASSIGN THEM YOURSELF.~~  
AFTER 2.0.0 THERE ARE NO KEYBINDS. MIGHT ADD IF THERES DEMAND.

With Clearviews, you’ll no longer have to deal with fog in water and lava, or have your view limited by blindness or darkness effects. Every feature is configurable, giving you full control to customize it just the way you want.

Here’s a full list of what **Clearviews** can do:

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- **[Configurable] Remove Nausea Overlay:**  
  Takes away the nauseating screen wobble and blur effect, letting you play without the dizzying visuals.

- **[Configurable] Remove Darkness Effect:**  
  Gets rid of the darkness that you get from wardens, giving you more visibility.

- **[Configurable] Remove Blindness Effect:**  
  Removes the heavy black overlay from blindness, giving you a bit more visibility.

- **[Configurable] Configure Fog:**  
  Configure each type of fog! That includes, lava, water, fog, darkness, blindness and powdered snow!
  
- **[Configurable] Remove spyglass overlay** 
  Removes the black spyglass border and the texture of the spyglass. examples in gallery

- **[Configurable] Remove portal overlay**
  Removes the portal overlay, example in gallery.

- **[Configurable] Remove Pumpkin Overlay:**  
  Removes the pumpkin blur effect when wearing a carved pumpkin.

- **[Configurable] Remove Locator Bar:**  
  Removes the locator bar introduced in 1.21.6!

- **[Configurable] Remove Vignette Overlay:**  
  Removes the vignette! You can see what its like in vanilla minecraft when you get close to the border.

- **[Configurable] Change Fire Overlay Opacity:**  
  Modify how see-through the fire overlay is! Is also compatible with low-fire resourcepack.

- **[Configurable] Change Particle Opacity:**  
  Change the opacity of most ingame particles from 0-100%.




</details>


Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
